projectDescription: A curated collection of 1800+ high-quality icons for self-hosted dashboards, available in SVG, PNG, and WebP formats with light/dark variants, delivered via CDN.
keyFeatures: 1800+ curated icons for services, applications, and self-hosted tools
Multiple formats: SVG (source), PNG and WebP (512px auto-generated)
Light and dark icon variants for theme compatibility
CDN delivery via jsDelivr for fast global access
Community submission system with admin review via PocketBase backend
GitHub Actions workflow for automated icon import and metadata updates
Integration with Homarr, Homepage, Dashy, Heimdall, and other dashboards
Kebab-case naming convention with alias and category metadata
publicApiSurface: metadata.json: full icon registry with aliases, categories, variants, and update history
Web API: getAllIcons(), getIconData(iconName), getIconsArray(), getTotalIcons(), getRecentlyAddedIcons(limit)
